Home / Services / Sealcoating

Sealcoating

Protect your asphalt investment with professional sealcoating services.

Sealcoating is a crucial maintenance step for extending the life of your asphalt pavement. Buckeye Surface Maintenance offers professional sealcoating services that protect your driveway or parking lot from the damaging effects of weather, traffic, and chemicals. In Cleveland, the freeze-thaw cycle can wreak havoc on asphalt, causing cracks, potholes, and deterioration. Sealcoating creates a protective barrier that prevents water from penetrating the asphalt and causing further damage.

Our sealcoating process involves thoroughly cleaning the asphalt surface, filling any cracks or imperfections, and applying a high-quality sealant. We use only the best sealcoating products that are specifically designed to withstand Cleveland's harsh climate. Our experienced team ensures even application and proper curing for optimal protection and longevity.

Regular sealcoating not only protects your asphalt from damage but also enhances its appearance, giving it a fresh, black look. It also helps to prevent oxidation and fading, keeping your pavement looking its best for years to come. We recommend sealcoating your asphalt every 2-3 years to maintain its integrity and extend its lifespan.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Surface Cleaning and Preparation
  2. 02 Step 2: Crack Filling and Repair
  3. 03 Step 3: Sealant Application
  4. 04 Step 4: Curing and Drying

Benefits

  • Protects Asphalt from Weather Damage
  • Extends Pavement Lifespan
  • Enhances Appearance
  • Prevents Oxidation and Fading

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I sealcoat my asphalt?

We recommend sealcoating your asphalt every 2-3 years to maintain its integrity and extend its lifespan.

How long does sealcoating take to dry?

Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to dry completely, depending on weather conditions. We will advise you on the best time to apply sealcoating based on the forecast.

Can I sealcoat my asphalt myself?

While it is possible to DIY sealcoating, professional application ensures proper preparation, even coverage, and optimal results. Our experienced team has the equipment and expertise to get the job done right.
